0&2100202&000133032000&00&330203001&02&232303001130&3003202&0003230030300330&203&93030031200&2402E80000318A030&0000021423010&&01214&301300201&A261312&13120331D22B7&030032000130223&000B&2002&&0&60030&30312820033003210&023313B20&02002&0030003003262&000021&2030020130231&02300263013000200300&003100023&10023013010&0&23003103000102030122&20000302030012030020021300&&70032226313&&00201&3&703003021301&0001&0301203010323230032603363010&1022E&20&0321033000&220303&00&30002103201000&220&0126022602&7000300&010201302&6020001&002000&&0000120021A0003300&31340380&&4133710021&000120031&20&2100&&030300300&0321A03002030010000&14&0003201&000&1A01301000033000&0001000226&12&00&100&120030&3D0013710000&0130200300031000310&03003301103720337300&33&000&2&003300010&0&203&00&&0130022&01300&60238400333000&&&14&0012031&103023010201&A0&0&&&011&39033732002302130134000&00302&00030&02211B0003001&011002033120021033120300021A2601230&&00&&0&0021020130&02300&1340&&&00&723&D&01303013B&2&1B0302&130211&20003010000&0003302&002021000&02302&303E003&703&726601103062&&&31D60012300210200&2001300030310000210023&02030&&000&000&1&00&10&2363236037001371&00&33002300&&0&000030010&2100300&&20021002100320010023D2230200320102103D1337000&221&00110023&022&70033700011B1121&002E3326&702370300033B23000120&00&&333003921&401142303103030010213403310&3&00310230100010&0120320210033003002010002&3031B443300133701&2001100031033003210002&03010&02301237200322103002031120&1003002302014100&&26&2&03020100&&1302&000222144413300032300&11&001&402&020000&0230&&31002103&&20301013000310300230201020300000&0&2102&&000&01333731003300&10&3&200031300200013&0&2037300110000203003002302032&11&23012000&00&31003&0113&1201321030000022E02100&02&01&2&0&0230&00130030032313&300&0126312603100300&&6&2260&00003320&&201&011&00100&&10&00120000&3210003000&002001&600103332100320&1&0&02301&&30330100002302010013603010020031&31001370120&02&31300201&6032630103223&1230033001300&200320310&010&0&&0303030002331403003120&00&&2200022&4203112301003100303&&31020112337&&&&&A013&30010010032003&&0011B2037011&2200331001&0&&20&10302&120303130001430260&0&600320&&3&&1002&310300&&3&33&&13330330003201&033211B000&00&13&0&1030&02&E013B&1&0310320&000331003030301030233211B210&03012303120100&00000&0&31030102&0003300&103023021132310021B030001233143&003214200013001022301&001000310001&0002&000&23&0303300&&10&&3&70031&3114&031220010&926137133703000113&0&&020&00010021E0023913370200230003221&421032141200&10000&0003100300303200&20000&021200200332001&&03001372012371003F2000&&0210020&&&&&370211B7&01&61023390002&001023&1231140&0113010230210012100&0113001103013200010&03011B72000310001&0000230000330023&110&20&010&&021001230031&000200&20100010&031122310201&3&7000300003010300210&01&00&03&1&0322E10&2&6022223001360328030001022323&00&0300020031000020&2&&723390000330&0221330&00&0&20003103013013&20102130&10222010&1030021&200&12&20010033F3114103003203102&3013220&03003280126100&&2&203120301001330110&0011430300003302030283012600322113&7&&33&0&03300021B44A44414B1144AB4&1B43B411B44A3&A71A5A4&4&A74AAFB444114A&34BAB4&4AB141A44B4414&4&A&B4&4A&4441AA741AA&A74444ABB4A441BA44444143&1&2302031&22800213260000&301223021300012E022&0011300322E3731001122130&000&6&112262000&0&01&22103300213023030021013000203300326&0001&01303134033020&31023302&010&0121222600010&&&0330000300203314&03201203020010&030&&022201002E02&8&030&00223E&00230&0&02&&140000&&7&0&11030&&223630122010&0120310132010030020123D0&0031330002&02260&&0&033&&001300023000213030030&&2316000&01100012013003126013A113201&3&3&2010&0&01300213230126300133D01320&&&&1&031030233&&&330020000330101&&33010321020010232003102&00320&301&2326&13300310&033&0003010012003&7031201003011B26023603&&&0&2&3E3033&&001&3712001&030032227&&612300210000&1&&&&0031&0020031220&230100&12&0&A0&0&1&0&33&203033&&31200&003322030300022&02001302003313003&0002&0003302&0&0102&312001020311B201153602100012021300330030&3337033F100034131&0&0317&3&7&02321E31230102003370300&1F0001370002033D0011442373DE21D600013373114001200133D0&1B20013&32&03110700126032217030000&&D&&2&7002300&200100311522100020&01337032&10002003201F21C0&&3&032337&&8152611330003&2600339353721002363&2220&3000330003B&0&30&&0321E70&0000020&&132002&7033F0012022337220012010033393003122030303010000301003201030031&3D0100137210237026012&40102203&72733&&1023702372010&01203200&2301&40&210300&00&1&0230002102023202&&00000&&&&203030310022326030211&0303&0&120&220001&40&322&0&0021&032030&3232000311002&023E00&430012363000013130033&12&0&00123&0000302&00&22610333723123032&1132&303012&303000&7330011320&302&&113320014020033330002&1&603&72001&013312602&A0&002&0&2&3&2202302011200133D&&023&1000&2200312000&2311702&0&2&&D0320003&7&1&7003002033&00210220130303700&23D000022302200&0210230&00312003303002310020&123&BD002031337&33222C371330333702370022000232223&11&6322823700312233003&00&2370202&00003373331233000&7031000&0262251D830&&000303&930&0&33&0&0310373&03102010001&4001&202130000000337233D1002000233F&0&20&330&40030213&&2330&10000333723&73122E23222114010326&3F2260&73&0022301222103001102602&60010&03&12&131200130&001321&023201&023100&00002213914&6&&&2233000&0020130330003302&10023130001&7002302&020032003&7223D00000303&0&&0000321033&E7103023800032031&&&10200&2030102&&&&00012012&010000&2321030&237033D0100200322D000&&002&00&013220302100330313700&0103314B20410&100&220002&0214&9&02002&D20&1B3&&00032039120023332033203230103200&00311&1&000&&0002&002200021&0&&1002230032180226&2261300135&000&201023012320112002&41&&0&1022&00032132001230&32000323302021A03023122630120&&0220&000&20030630322310020023&&&002&2631000&10011020&&0&02000330&212&1132033&326301302030023&003&&312263&2&&1030221&20&01320312&2330&&&002&8&32E0003&3&00002133F0003&&10&2326013&D03&71020&10&000&2200&210&100&001200030232&30130023100200&0300&1000210331221610&00001A01200001230312010&200&&00&&0202&223260120232126&0022303102&020003&00352802&61030120003120310230031B0332033D1D33&0202103&&&0&20&1200&2033003220133D021D3260031D81371202033100373337322100&223D&3000&23226011502001320&12&&1000&&&&&937132021&22236003332301021013390002311E102039013700302333D033F0022&02&6&03002120010203120312&2021321140101201&3030&0001231022033220237200230&0001232613&370&&200322013&230133002030202360230102&010&0137&1310231020&0&310&01237002&70&221000&020003030132002330000031&00120&132&&3F2733173003200330010&0&&&0&23000&00&001&&&10&0020&100&0&&&23&02&0003&030231&&1000322E&3120&1000&0&02&323193001031301120&12E7000031&27&03300&130202321221&4030&001230021233F3&2&2030033001322200&0230&3100021D2230E337000&02313030022000031&621130031D3732&0003030203023D3115001020132&&&120300123&0&&2302&01333D32&280&3226122E0137010200&0203120&&2010&13A20132&1232100020&332100022130200030030301&0&020330201&0030002140033221020&33&280200302320032340222032&3022C332E0&13022102&&2030020002000103&000320&&11000&00200112000230300310000200&&&&1300230100330300220&0310&0302&&&&&102000&20&&&&&702001&&3300100320100&033B332003&0033213210&&00301001&121000200220&&003330&3120&11002233030301222&1002&0203&&&&22230036201&0031020&00&0002142132&000100223&00&00&&30&332001013122&0002&020002210023&0&2&000030201200&233710230373&003D0001432F400238B3D2733302120&13100&&0&02&23001100&336&02203&&21&000134331B000&00013302031&10001&0033373300&312221100&&02103&9033D1003002&0203102310120002&010&20&0&001F001203301&60&12E&0301A372001022&70200333003022&&33102&320002&0220&2030303100003300&00&21001322&26&&&114211423013023213700110&4032&03001&020031000122810222&&130002&0021103&7100102&26&000000201301&0003&00210&2333212001303000013&E300&&&000&0003000231&0&220&02621&42030330123013&00221&00&0203120003&712&71201200&10022601233102820&&0203&10&10020002&1000300&0023102001003103D00001370&1021&0033100&72030123001230010212323001223&&3&10303020&00&130&&002&717331&20030300&70002370012&3373002030031430&00032&26&230230020310&120203302021&0010&3&03200&001000100&0000002230300383D261&700002&360330&030210&100&&60013140263&0102832261000&&30003&13&321&A3100002302226301&100003301&328&22621003012030030103&&0&130210&&0032230013D&020370022301030102&011223702&00&0013002&00300234001&00132360&230&&&00021402140139003900102&01032032103200300&&&0&02300&23&02301001010&0000203&0&133010200&&&210030220031231203210020001&00000202&610228&002&300&0012001200380&2&&03902003F0&000331002&0&0030033030&31301200032&000033&0&200&0002301000&033001300&42032003&103140&0236323&&3140003403260126011A01030103&100&0200&31126010&80302&31003033210012300010&&0&1140031371200380126&401&420211B00&70&3037200003103002002303001&&0&1&000200&32301120103201&400000&111&0&&4011B&3011002003010&0&&&00123002300000&021000030322800210&603&3001142233&&0000&&002001&40&002011023110&0023201300&02000000011300&260&0B37034301302003703290210030&&&00230014&333200314&237013D10030330000120330&0280310301032600&322&000&2000&33010030&200303&&&100320000323300&&010030&0230003022010&030&31003201&22130&&03&00&1&0100013002011B337222320011B031B33&0030123000210032&01022&&&&00&&0210210020&&000&261000223317&0&003303001&020030103&3203103003220&020030022331143000&12100&014391B1D0112030303030001313001013&01230021&72033F203&10&0030333023001230011401300030300203102&00&123022&000320012&700300300210300&001&A01&0203003000030233000132011300&131000&0114201302003010&2013&0213&200&&00&00202102310&&00010&0022&0000&0000&9&03&010&00330&114000230&20000001320100033E00012311203214&1&40001103200023&1B2314020032610&00033726&00012630103023&01103011A000033&0234&30001B3&0&200&0334132&0&2001&01010102&130&0&100121B731B0&&00&032300330001301&2&00&41023000330020110&&&12&23203021000300303211002&0&0&0&1213002301A030100&01030000&3300310302&40&1430013200013372003314131301003912132920032&0&000&0&02230303&02&1432013200&022300&230010000&023133F43010003&22020200339300&023300&20&0202233D01B01143023143&00&13&02003000&2000220030012&030&11A20231731000&D302&13363000&00303&400013E0000371&&02E2300102603722322D00230023114030010&&0&D0001311&3331400&102&&&&&020001143210261300010001&37&0002C1403003E001&A01370&03003012002&302E00130280&&3331FE000&021&001020030203030030002310023&0&10200033&&213300301&33&0003003037203&3200&00&201&023E000003200330036&030&20&00013002&30001&10339020303&0133D012B&01363228B0021102&30100&132002010133D0012300233033402013D002&371&&0122&&02110032141313102&00203&&0&010020003201428&4&&00003&E700023700010023100000232320121337&&2314&&03140320&03011B33&&21000&700133720114&3&11020001203&100130002612B222&020003000113033100300&32&B700302003&&01&203&100200330323332000210&3000&30002&&100&&20&20101E10000&3912E6&0&10063&263230014300003100011117010&0002E1&31000101E7&3112E&1300&&&028322&00013232E3710333012211A&3102E0032&01020001300110200010&140&152&611B000&10023130203031&02&62301&123&300&003&C94021400036301&026&0233&3226&13700133930331&3701F30000023001301&1&7323&00&033&00113000&2610&0&0002&3&370&0&0214&10&2&0230&2010033D1033D10020&0230203001230000&10031F30030&13300110&2&7123310231&4&013200333D0&02&0221&2021&23300300033102333F1&&13012012&&0000&003200301343030&00&3102&102&&0023002200&0&1&001300&031B1002011001A&10002&100&&&&0000132&262312030331&0332&01032001263&0003001260000336003130&238032210&1000323023903&40033230&32&10233371300230013&200323203&10032&020&02&301122E2100102300021320102&3&02&3100030&0003220032002&313&0&0020001&420033003F000203D2002&02300&13&370000&&0&00033140115300&333100230203030010021236001302031023337103300&03&021300&0200&&03300&00&102002021001&31&3721303223&001&0021E0&0039002&6&1000&83001002&260112E21120310002002033270&11220130001300&&&0&00222002033000013100&002010301&02200203101E&3D&6200310&012003013&3102103&70&31310&03122&3600&2&02122300302100&6230&00000&600&002613301013000020213700310230003A&&0021320013&37303002&61101021002311E1003332000300&7003337221214&33B1020&2100300003&130231022601&302001330&0&32&02003&0100&2030&1410002&010233&72201&&13030031143110121&4300&21330113002243334302110200&0132200134302210&3&102&0&0223720301030013&&3&&&&0310200030033&000030201321142000&02301&00313B0003210330012310000&&00&&&321003200&000&03303129401&0010&320030&002300&1337303D003203&&100&203&3730020&260228&&3102203114300011E323603011302360&26300&022E0226011330002201B211403D12B7202&&&&&200&13021&000114&&01000&02260003210030&0030012033&0030211&&1310&0&2339203&00030&120013&0&000137&&80&1003&00281B010&601033034&2033130001&00020331003&22603002102010200030330030020201&3020003010032160&00020030300332&0&032011&&0&60226031002&1000&0021300300221332001&2303002003&021337&30020&0200&&0&1003211002132010213003003230001231&00&02260337112013702203712100337335E&2&03F000103203140&940020112033322&00033100&0&030120001322E&00&0020310322029A01102137001&32218023112030103&&&&&0&403031423312&30132&0&132&033F300&&2200&001003211B0&&0133&02&83003&300233001&&0203003&03120332002322E021032000337213&300&200&3A000&3010020003143&13010&01&0002001&262033001A311B2228&A31020010032100301020&001030&0&03&30&01320000&&&226203010&0133222600&2003&0002300223022&100&0321A0&0&0010030&100&2002300230012B0032210020&3&00&13230130001&0&00&&010&023&D000&000000033320373100&3003012&7&002&&2263321320121030200010213203011B2&0010201&00&02&31330&0&A01240001102231020101&020012130021001301&4123&&03301&00000103120311000013&70003110&2&0020330213003002033211B10030120020&&&00033A02&40&013B02E&22E01&01031933002300310&00232013&21&32000322113322030300010&230300320&03&002338000210001&000313A30003&000&&0023&0221030001B00238013100311&33001030&&11A030&0333000&31&0200201301200&&220133D0&&&00313000101321001000&002002&010102&002&023021&420&003100120&1337000130223030&10&0223000&&&&001323&003002321002320&214&0023100&000&022&&20&123000&4203&1001&01&00013&001030&0&002003&10003010&102310&231&40030331022130200123200&000310030033010&1020&&140010&&0&3100030033&010200&02001312102&&1&203F1001203&0&2&&1003&71&0&0300&1000313842&003203112&300&01A&114&321&A010&2003&00200&0321023102&03&00013000131000322100&0&&300114332010&&10220001&A00&30&03003100000030&&1002010300012112&02&1003200&&0&002100&&10&13000&3&&3300&&01200103003226003&30132100213000210200120101E7032103&1211002330303010&2010&000203001&&00&2003001330102&0&0210&00013&300&0102030&0&00261033100302211020&0003&2003&0003301200102&033143201&&0001&0000&00031&023&0301&702&700330036303102201330032601&300001&60100036000021220000&&&&&02&0&00203&1&&&&302010001120&0320014&0&0100&&&&&1001002&00237100021&2000&&0&10&0020001&020&300200302&0&003100202020100&00000&&&20010022130231132010003&00&&130&003&123030000&1320&B20&40002&00123000012&1020300003332&&002100032013020021200&003200231330000310302326003130260&0&0222003028012600130230000013&0001&&01002&1200&200300122260&0022300&02E03&6000&00&&200&3010&&0&010203001103303230000210&01&20000130100030003210&0003140214&001300102226030022210333612&6030132220023312&1020&20103200033322E&0&000000&&10020&0000220320102000003&1&&301&01&02021&3210012&0021A60236&&0&0&01&2E11A260&&2231000&&3110200014031413D114140230A1030000300003&200&&0&11410&3&1000123&20&030300211B100013&1120314&0000130&13300360&2611B1000200&0010&3002301&41020&&23&&&&10&01&2002&A2814203110301&00210320&021&42013000130230302003&02011B001320100033320021400102300010003302&020000&&220&0021000&00&000102030001&&&02023031&003200&0010012030&030011&&&0310003&26232003200&4013B002&100303233370&&&012003313A201&0031300301&&&&&00013221003&3333A2633300321030100013B100&1122301&0231&0001&22E00130033021002033001030031023000200302&000&&0&200&312220&003023100033262013&00113&0030&&3200&0&0220021A001&&00&303300300&22&000&&0123&0003102&3841020&00&&030130301A3E00122231030013203030132&0&02001&2003012001132000320&20130114022603301&02&10&30330002030010&003020103&00011000&&00000130001200001302E02360000&03&9&330020331300&2300&&1000&3&201000003&020120032100020003002&010213&71302030311&02&0030030002302012&&3&002300113300&420011100&21013002013B&&&&0010132001023E322800&13002130330&0&10&0303031B000300023003&&023&13&00&0&0203&031103030023303&010033200&000&&4130200&0031200203100001023312000230102031&00343213&0303021003&2001000214201000223&2301001&000&0001100&1&0130000&003143021230203102&2600100012314001&2&00203103D12001&600103D236003&70320&1331&0&900001&A2&1003D10&2011&00&37&03B0&311A312020020237011B031033&0100221&&033D28&&010301&00&31&&003&011B0&03301&41033D001030133&001039&137000003&0&&13020031&20133000&0203&370337002013423200&0&2000103303&2&E1010302121030&20013100002&001137&22B700332E0&&01030221390023003301032210&701391430200300&11233310300300010300300300&&&1137033D00232310000100228&00030303001&&02302030300&&000&00260000&0&032260&0&0211013270&10&0&72033F300&00001032&120&00337003200&00310000&101&72023D&00023&2&&3200012232E00&&00031B37&20003001010&30&0&00&&&&1&0&3002113&9033122280023233D002001&001031034001020&72100032220003140203&370102&03391A39&21103D00&D0320002&7033700033001302301230123&&&32011226130330013000303201021333391031&0&1403140013&2001200037&037&21000130020000&032B370203&113010013003313A0003332013023001&40390330223&700130&&&&&900&10039200&7&0201401&53337030131210002333210039133721020101339031000&2300110&3&D30300003210133100132013D00011303310&37&201000&013270103373&031&00000231&421&3372339200100032902110231003&000&2002033&1001&33000&2214030003403&&01&&0032&37303100130023100&2021300003&0133020&002120&0&10032260032312001011&0002000137033D3002030333D113003033712&0000001300221&000&0137012000300310203000&&223D010237&1&&7023140&12&371330&002303130232B0114&70137013020033190&13900331B0&033&02300110122303011200129433700203142&7032130&&023003000&720&40000312000021&&601030003322&00231&0&00210302&1&0012E0103002630010228002300&200&4000002800&721&70026114331&1322000&6010002&70231030103&20300&7102E3339&00030202371142233&00111201&D01&0001331F&37&29B013432&001310&700032&&300000&1003F263319&000211413130300003032003710&0230003712&70010013B&3710&&0&021A003201371226&123130001040283370102633&&&226&103&12&7&10003000&712372100001312030&30313444B4441A5B114A14B44A14BA4441BC144B641A44A4B144B434&&44443441A4&4&44B144A4B612BC41A4144B441BA4&4A44444441ABBA74B94B&644344A7B144B1&445A444A14443B&414B4444A41BA44B6A114&033000&13002030102031&203307&&&303332133&01020&03300&7371&37&001&3000223D01&3&03002030000&00&03&7&200000003B3&3703001203200030033&2261B2003713020113&37320101003&0200210031&030&20&0003&&0&2001500000301B&&00030&11020332010&3000330100020010123003003001130103300231200321002233F000014300013000021B02&11330&03003233700230&10023000&0&01300&0&001123&000&&1A31140020033&&&0&3001&70&210200&&903370&002&0132700303002001&0&003003310&0230001&00&0001302203&00231213&220&01230&3003020372010&022317312&10300303343&3&70&10003302301140320&100013023&30200&00303022300&&1210320000012330021030&00220&021432&020132001023&200331020102E01300&000&860000216222032010&60&&0&300126E011&008&33021300100&10301002&02130130300312&430036302&00&600033F26001000110036001001C370&22003028000&130101D0&1&400&0200100303003300&2100331&&0023100&000102001130021&002333701233210200130023002&&&&030&321&0330300031020021142E71237010&261237036370001320&000&&1321003327000300003320000&20113&&13D001012033&0001&002370210&300234&3D0210000&21&3D0373012010&0&&00&030&2800033703&D00000013012002&700302&0120311001032&021002633020&0002201343&01&&00360102301142030&0030141130&&3000300102110&001430200314033F0010&39000&030021410037133F00026103&140&0223002&20003120320103101033D20132030&130220&0200103003320013&00112202&0&0&72&03003D0023710210&001&400&&0032&&&23100030300&2230100010&0023010001010&3&11002101&332&&231&00120031100301&0020010021302&030001033022311203013&100&13200&010021200&903&700100023102003&02&10&100300&700122E92000333&00&310013&0002360031142601&0032E00113022101E100&&2E00101203031B0210&&010130&3012030011&0&0201300012223&0&2&02311326130&10263&3701360&390023030E00103360390220&1371303D000300021&4&010022133160&130030036&0000&84000102&00&6000311&60101210003&02001323&3030030003B3&703&90000102&0100&30030&311&0013600300000&2E001302&000310200133&130203D&&11002&6&10013260301&2&8000000&2011E0103028100013001002001203&3D03300&2037133710002000300&40002300&1&6130
&&210020220001&303200020&0&30203&01&0222&2&030011300&0&32022000323&&&0&003&00203&930&0031200&2402E80000318A0&0&0000021423010&00121423013002012A261312&1&120331D22B7&0&003200013022&00&0B&2002600&600300303128200&3&03210&02331&B202&2002&00&0003003262200002122030020130231&0230026301&0002&0&0020&3100023&10023013010&0&23003103000102030122C200003&2&30&12&3&020021300&&700322263130&0020103&70&0&3021301&0001&0301203010323230032603&63010&1022E220&032103&0&0222&303200&&0&0210320100022200012602260227000&00&0102&1&&2&6020001&002000&&000012&021A&00&300031&40380&&4133710021&00012003102002100&0030&00&&&&0321A030020&0010000&1420003201&000&1A013010000&300020001000226012&00&100012&030&3D0013710000&0130200&00031&0031000&003301103720&37&00&&3&000&2&&0&300010002203&00220130022201300&6023840033&000&&&14&0&120312103&23010201&A0000&&&112390337320&23021&&1&40000&&30220&030002211B000&001&01100203312&021033120300021A2601230&20000020021020130&02300&1&402020027232D001&0301&B02&1B03022130211&20&030100002000&3022002021000&02302&30&E00327032726601103062&&&31D6001230021020022&01&&00&031000021002&202030&&000&000&1&&0010&2&632&60&7&&13712&0&330023000&02000030010&210030&0220021002100320010023D2230200320102103D1337000&221&001100232022270033&00011B11210002E33262702370&00033B23000120000203&&003921&40114230310&0&001021&40331003&003102301000100&1203202100&300&002&1000203031B44&300133701220011000310&300321000200&010&&2301237200322103002031120&1003002302014100&02622&030201000013022000222144413300032&00&1100&124022020000&02300031002103&&203010130003103002302010203&0000200210202000&01&33731003&00&10&3&200&31&002000130002037&0011000&20&00&002302032&11&23012000&00231003&0113&1201321030000022E02100&02001&20020230&001&0030032313&&00&0126312603100&00&&62226020000332002201&011&001000210&00120000032100030&0&002001&60010333210032001&0&023&1&&30&3010000230201001&60301002&&31231001370120202&3130&201&6032630103223012300&3001300&2&0320310&&1&00&&&&&&&&00023&1403003120200&22200022242&311230100310030&00&10201123370&&&2A01323&010010032003&00011B2037011&2200331001&&&220010302&1203031300014&026&&0&600320&&30&10020310300&&32330&1&&&&&300032012033211B0&02002130001030&022E01&B01&031032020003310030&0301030233211B210&030123031201002000&0&0&310301022000&&002103023021132310021B0300012331430003214200013001022301&001000310001&000220&0&230030&300&&10&&327003123114&031220010&926137133703000113000202&200010021E002391337020023000322124210&21412&0210000&00031&0300303200220000&021200200332001&00300137201237100&F20&0220210020&00003&0211B&&01&61023390002&0010230123114&&01130102302100121002011300110&013200&10203011B72000310001&00002300003&00230110&202010&0021001230031&0002002201000100031122310201&327000&00003010300210&01&00003&1&0322E1002&6022223&01&6032803000102232&&00&0300020031000020220272339000&&3020221330200&022000310&013013020102130010222010&1030021&200012C20010033F3114103&0320310223013220&03003280126100&&2&2031203010013&011000&11430&0&00&30203&283012600322113&7&&33&0203300021B44A44414B1144AB4&1B4&B411B44A3&A71A5A4&42A74AAFB444114A&34BAB4&4AB141A44B4414&4&A&B4&4A24441AA741AA&A74444ABB4A441BA44444143&1&230203102280021&260000&301223&21&00012E02260011300322E3731001122130&000&6&112262000&0&0102210&30021&023&&0021013000203300326&000100130&1&4033020&3102&&&2&01000121222600&1022&0&3000030&20331400320120302&01&&0&0&2022201002E02&8&030&00223E200230200022&140000&&700&110300222363012201000120310132010030020123D020031&30002C022602200033&&0013&00230002130&0030002&16000&01100012013003126013A1132010&&3&2010&0&013002132&0126300133D013200&&&120310302&3&&&&30020&0&3&01010233&10321020010232003102200320030122&26013300310&0&32000301001200327031201003011B2602&60320&00223E3033&&0012&712&01&0300322272261230&210000&1&&&&0031000200312202230100&12202A00021200&30203&3&&&312002003322030&000222020&1302003313003&0&0200&0330220&0102&312001020311B20115&602100012021300&300&003337033F1000&413120&&&17&&&7&02321E31230102&03370&0021&0001370002033D0011442373DE21D600013373114001200133D0&1B2001303200311&70012603221703&00022D002&70023002200100311522100020201337032&10002003201F21C0&&320323370&8152611330003&2600339353721002&6322220&30&03&000&B&0&30&00321E70&000002020132002&7033&001202233&22&&12&1003339&003122030&030100&0&010&3201030031&&D0100137210237026012&40102203&72733&&102370237201020120320022301&40&21030&200&10023000210202&20220&00002202203&&0310022&26030211&030&0001202220001&40&3222000021&032030&3232&00311002C02&E00&43001236300&&131&0&3301200&0012&0&000302C00022610333723123032011320&030122&0&000&73&00113200302&0113320014020&333&0002&1260327200120133126022A02&0220&20302202302011200133D&00232100022200312000&2311702002202D03200032701&700&002033&00210220130&&&700&23D00002230220&20210230000312003&0300231002001232BD0020&1&37&33222C37133&&33702370022000232223&11&6322823700312233003200023&0202&0000337&33123&0002703100000262251D83022000&03&9300003&&0&031037300310201000124001020213000&000&3&233D100200&233F&00200&30&40&302130&2&3021000&333723273122E2322211401032603F226&27&00022301222103001102602&600100030126131200130&001321&0232010023100&00002213914&6000223300000020130&3000&302&100231&0&012700230220200320&327223D00000&0320220000321033&E71030238000320310&&1020022030102022000012012&010000223210&&2237&33D010020&322D000&&&022000&132203021003&03137&&&0103314B20410&10&222000200214&90020020D2001B3&&00032039120023332033203230103200&0&311&1200&&&00022002200021&0&&10&223003218022622261300135&0002201023012320112002241&&0010222000321320&1230&32000323302021A030231226301200202202000&2&0&&630322310020023&&2002&2631000&10011020020002000330&21201132033232630130203002&000&0231226322221030221020&01320312223302&20&2&8032E0003&3200002133&00032210&23260132D0327102&&10&000&22&0&210&100&00120&0302320&0130&2310020&00&00&1000210331221610&00001A0120000123&312010&2&0&&002002020223260120232126&0022&031020020&&300&352802261030120003120310230031B0332033D1D33202021032020&20&1200220&3003220133D021D3260&31D8137120203310037&337322100&223D03000&232260115020&1320012221000&&&&&937132021022236003&32301021013390002311E102039013700&023&3D033F0022602&6003002120010203120&120202132114&101201230&0&0&01231022033220237200230200&123261&23700220032201302301&3002030202&60230102&010&013&0131023102&&&0310&012370&2&700221000202000&030132002&30000031&00120&132&03F27&317&0032003&0010&0&020&2&000&00&001&&&1000020&1000002023002200&&00302310&1000322E&3120&10&020&020323193001031301120&12E7000031&2700&300&13020232122104030&001230021233&3&2&203003&00132220020230231&&&21D2230E3370002023130&0022000031&62113&031D3732&000&030203023D31150010201322&&120300123200&23022&1333D32&280&3226122E0137010200202&&120&&2010213A20132&123210002003321000221302000&0&&0301&00020330201&0&30002140033221020&3322802&&&&2320032&4&22203203022C332E0013022102022030020002000103&0003200&1100&200200112000230&00310&00200220213002301003&030022000310&0302200221020002202&022702001&&&30010&320100&03&B3&2003&00332132102200301001&1210002002200&00333023120&11&022330&03&1222&100220203&&&2222300&620120031020200&0002142132&000100223&00&0020&0&33200101312220002202000221002320&22000&30201200&2337102&037&0003D0001432&400238B3D2&33302120&131002&020222300110003&6&02203&&21&0001&4331B00020001&302031010001&&&&337&30003122211&02202103&9033D100&002202031023101200&2&010020002001&001203301260012E003&1A3720010222702003&&00302200&3102&3200&22022022030&031000&3300&00021001322&26&&2114211423&13023213700110&40326030012020031000122810222&&13&002C0021103&7100102&26&000000201301&0003200210&2333212001&0300&&132E&00022000&000&0002310022202026212420&0330123013000221&0020203120003&712&7120120&&10022601233102820020203210&10020002&100030020023102001003103D&0001370&10212&0331002720&012300123001021232300122302301&3030200000130&200227173312200&0300&7&0023700122&37&002030031430&00032&2602302&0&203100120203302021&001003&032002001000100&&0000022&0300383D261270&002&3603&0&030210&1002&6001314026&00102832261000223000301&03212A3100002302226301&1000&&30103282226210030120300&0103&&02130210&00032230013D&0203700223010301020011223702200&0013002&0030&2&4001200132&60&230&0&00021402140139003900102&0103203210&2003002020202300&23&023&1001010&&000203&0&133010200002210030220031231203210&20001&00000202&6102282002&300&001200120038022C003902003&0000&3310&2&02003003&&30031301200&320000033&00200&0002301000&0&&001300242032&03&103140002&632&60314000&403260126011A010&010321002020023112601028030223100&03321&012300010&&0&11400313712&038012624012420211B00270&&037200003103002002&03001&&001&000200&32301120103201&400000&111200&4011B23011002&0&010&&&&&00123002300000&0210000&0322800210&603&30011422&3&&0000&0002001&402002011&23110&0023201300202000000011&002260&&B3703430130200370329021&03022&002&00140&332&0314&237013D100&03300001203&000280310301032600&322C000&200023&01&030020030&&0&10032000032&300&&01&0&0202300030220102030&31003201022130&003000&100100013002011B337222320011B031B3300030123&00210032001022200&00020210210020000000261000223317202003&030012020030103&3203103003220202003&022331143000&12100&014391B1D01120303&&&&&&&131300101&001230021272033F203010&0&30&3&023001230011401&000&03002031022000123022C00&320012&700&&0&0021&300&0012A01&020300&00&03&2&&0001320113000131000&0114201302&0301022013&0213&200&000200202102310&&0001&20022C0000&000&&9003201&&00&30011400023022000000132010&03&E0&0123112&321401&4&001103200023&1B2314&20032610&00033726&0001263010&02&001103011A&&00&3&02&4030001B3&0220000&&4132&022001&01&101020130&0&100121B731B0&&000032300&300&1&0102&00&41023000&30020110&&&120232&3021000300303211002002000&1213002301A030100&0103000&&3300310302240&1430013200013372003314131301003912132920032&02000&0&02230303&02&1432013200&&2230022300100000023133&43010003222020200&39300202&&&&220&0202233D01B01143023143&00&13202&030002200&2200300122030&11A202&1&&10000D302&13&630000003&3C40001&E00003712&02E230010260&722322D0023002311403&010&002D0001311&33314&0&10220202020001143210261300010001&37&0002C140300&E0012A01&70&030030120020302E00130280003331&E&&02021&0010200302030&0030002310023200102000&3&&213300301233&000&00&0372032320020002012&23E000&03200&300&60&30220200013002&3000101&33902030&00133D012B&01&63228B0021102&3&1000132002010133D00123&023303&402&13D002&371&&&12220021100321413131&2000203&&0201002000320142824&000003&E70002&7000100231000002323201213372&2314&&03140320&03011B3&02210002700133720114&3&11020&01203&100130002612B222&020003000113033100&&0&322B70&3020030&012203&10&200330323332&0021003&000&0002001000220&20101E1000003912E620&10063&263230014300003100&11117010&&&02E1031000101E703112E01300&20028322C000132&2E3710333012211A&&102E0032&0102&0&1300110200010&140&1522611B0&0&10023130203&31&02&62301&12&0300&003&C940214000&6&01&0260023303226013&&01339&033123&01&3000002&001301&127323&000033&00113000026102020002032370&0&0214&10&220230&201003&D1033D100202023020300123&00&210031&300&0&1&300110&2&71233102&124201320&&33D0202&0221&202102&300&0003310233&F10&13012012&200002003200301&430&0000&3102&102&&002300220&&0012001300&031B1002011001A&10002&100&&&&0&00132&262312030331&0332&010320012632000300126000&3&6003130223803221001000323023903&40033230232&10233371300230013220&32&203010&3220202020&01122E2100102300&21320102030020310003020003220032002031&&020020001242&0&3003&0&0203D2002&02&00013&&70000220&00033140115300&3331002302030&0010021236001302031023337103&00003202130&20200&00&&00&000102002021001&312372130&22&0001&0021E000039002&6&10&0&830&1002&260112E21120310002002033270&11220130001&00&&&020022200203&00001&10&&002010301202200203101E23D&6200310&01200301&03102103&7&&31310003122&360002002122&0030210&26230&0000&&600200261330101&00002021370031023000&A020021320013&37&030&2&61101021002311E100&332000&002&0033372212140&&B1020&2100&00003&130231022601&302001&3000&32&02003&010002030&1410002&010233272201&2130&003114311012124&00&213301130022433&4302110200201&22001&430221003&102&00022372&301030&13&03202003102000300330000&302&1321142000202301&00&1&B0&0321033&012310000&&000&&32100320&20000&3&03129401&001003200&0&002&00013&7&03D003203&2100&2032373002022602280&31&2203114300011E32&603011302&60226300&022E0226011330002201B211403D12B&20200220200&1&02100&0114&&0100020226000&2100&&&003001203&&0030211001310&002339203000030&12001300&000137&&80&1003200281B010&60103&0&4020331&0&01&000203310032226&3002102&10200030&300&0020201&302000301003216&&00020030&00332&0&032011&&0&60226031002&1000&0021300300221332001&230&0020030021337&30020&02002200100321100213201021300&0032300012&100020226033711201370220371210&337&&5E22&0&&000103203140&940020112033322000033100&0&&30120001322E00020020310322029A0110213700103221802311203&103&&&&&0&403031423312030132&0013260&&F300&222002001003211B&2&013&&02&8&0&3&&002330012&&20300&&03120332002322E0210320003372130&00&20023A00003010020003143&1&010&01000&20010262033001A&11B22282A31&20010032100301020&001030&0&03&30&01320000&2222620301020133222600&2003&0002300223022&10000321A&20&0010030&100&2002300230012B0032210020032002132301&000120000&&010&0232D000&00000003332037310003003012270&02&&226332132012103020001021320&011B2&0010201&00&02031&30002A01240001102231020101202001213002100130124123&&0&301&000001&312031100&013&70003110&2&0&2033&21300&002033211B10030120020&&200033A02240&01&B02E222E010010319&3002300310&0023201302103200&3221133220&0&0001&2230&0&320&03&002338000210&01&000313A3000&00002&0023&&221030&&1B00238013100311&3&&01030&&11A03000&33000031&0200201301200&&220133D0&200031&00010132100100&&002002&010102&00200230212420&003100120013370001302230&&&10&0223000&&&&00132&&&0&002321002320&214&002310020&02&226&20&12300024203&1001&01&00013&001030200002003&10&03010&102310&23124&0&033102213020&1232002&&03100&0033010&102&&&140010&2023100030033&0102002020&1312102&01020&F100120320&2&&10&3&7100&0&0&&1000313842&003203112&300&01A0114&321&A01002003200200&03210231020&3&00013000131000322100&002&00114332010&0102200012A&0&30&0&0031&000&&&0&&1002010300012112002&10032002&0&00210&&&10&13&0023&03&00&0012&01030032260&&&301&21002130002102001201&1E7032103&1211002330&03010&2010&000203001&00022&0&0013301&2&020210&000132300&010203&00&00261&3310030221102020003&200&&000330120&1022033143201&000012&0&0&000&1&02&00301&702&&003300&63031022013&0032601&3&0001&6010&0&60000212200&&&&&&20200&00203&1&&&&302&10001120&032001400&0100&&&&&100100200023710002122000&&0010200200012020&&002&0&02200003100202020100&0000&222200100221&0231132010003200&01&&&00301230&000001320&B20240002&00123000012&1020300003332&20021000320130200212002003200231&30000310302&26003130260&0202220030280126001&02&000&013&00012&01002012002200&0012226020022&00&02E03&600020000200&3010&&0&0102030&1103303230000210&010200001301000&0003210200&3140214&00130010222603002221033&61226030132220&23312&1020220103200033322E00&000000&&100202000022032&102000&&3&1&&301201&02021&3210012&0021A6&2&6&&0&0&0102E11A260&222310&0&&311020&014031413D114140230A103000&&0000322002&0&11410&3&100012322000&0&&0211B10001&&11203142000013021330036022611B1000200200100&002301241020&&23&&&&102&1020022A2814203110301&0&210320&02124201&0001302&0302003202011B0013201000&332002140010230001000&3020020000&222020021000&00200010203000120002023031&&03200&0010&12030&0&0011&&&0310003&262320&32002401&B002&1003032&3370&&0012003313A201200&1&00301&&&&&0001322100&033&3A263&&0032103&10001&B100&1122301&0231&&001222E0013&0&3021002&33001030031023000200&022000&&0&2000312220200&02310003&262013&00113200300&32&0&0&0220021A&01&&00030&300&00&22&0002&0123&000&102&3841020200&20301&0301A&E0012223103001320&030132200020010200&01200113200032022013011402260&301002&10&30&3&00203001020&30201032000110002200000130&01200001302E02&60000003&9&3&002&3&1&0022&00&&10000302010000032020120032100020003002&010213&7130203&311&02200300&000230201200320023001133&02420011100&2101300201&B220&&01013200102&E3228000130021&033000&10&0&0&031B0&030002&003&&023&1300&&0&0203&031103&&002330&0010033200&000&2413020020&31200203100001023312000230102031&00&43213&0&03&2100322001000214201000223&230100120&0&0001100&1&01&0000&0031430212&02&3102&260010001231400122000203103D12&012600103D236003270320&133100&9000012A2&1003D10&2011000&37&0&B02311A3120200202&7011B031&3&001002210&033D28&&0103012002312&003&011B000&301&4103&D001030133&001039&137000003&0&&1302003122013300000203&3&033700201&4232&020&2000103&03&22E101030212103002001&10&002&001137&22B7003&2E0&20103022139002300&301032210&7013914&0200300211233310300&0&010300&00300&&&1137033D0&2323100001002282000&&&03001&0&2302030&0002000&0026&00020&032260&00&211013270&1020272033&300&000010&2&1200003370&32002003100000101272023D00002322&&3200012232E00&&00&31B372200&&00101003000&00&020120&&002113&9033122280023233D002001&0010310&400102027210&0322200&3140203&370102&03&91A39&21103D002D0320002&70337000&&00130230123012300&32011226130&30013000&0&2010213&3391031&0&140314001322001200037&&3&02100&1300200002032B370203&11301001&003313A0003&32013023&0124039&3&02232700130&&&&&900&100&9200&700201401&5333703013121000233&21003913372102010133903100022300110030D30&00003210133100132013D0&01130&310237&201000001327010337&0031&00&00231&42103372339200100032902110231&03&000&200203301001&&30000221403&00&403&&01&00032&37&031001&00231&0220213&0003&01&302&2002120&&&10032260032312001011200020&0137033D&0020&0333D11300&033712200000013002212000&013701200&300310203000&0223D010237&1&&7023140&12&371&3&00023031&0232B0114&70137013020033190&13900331B0&0&3&02300110122&030112001294&3700203142&7032130&&023003000272024000&312000021&&601030003322C00231&&&00210302&120012E01030026300102280023000200&4&000028&02721270026114331&1322000&6010002270231030103&20300&7102E3339&000302&23711422&3&001112012D0120001331F&3&029B01&432&&01310&7000322&&00000&1003F263319&000211413130&0000&0320&3710002&0003712&70010013B&37100&02021A003201371226&123130001&402833701026332&&2260103012&701000&000&7123721000013120&003031&444B4441A5B114A14B44A14BA4441BC144B641A44A4B144B4&4&24444&441A4&4&44B144A4B612BC41A4144B441BA424A44444441ABBA74B94B2644&44A7B144B1&445A444A1444&B&414B4444A41BA44B6A11400&3000&13&02030102031&2033&702230&332133&01020&03&0027371237&&&1&3000223D01&30030020&0000200&03&7&20000000&B3&370&0012&32000&003322261B200371&&20113&37320101003&0200210031&030&2020003&0002001500000301B0&000&0&110203320100&0&&33010002001012300&00300113010&300231200321002233&000014300013000021B020113&000&003233700230&1002&00&200&1&0020&0011232000&&1A311400200332200&3001&700210200&&9033700002&0132700303002001&0&00&00331020230001&00200013&22032002&1213&2200012300&0030203720100022317312010&00303&4303270&10003&023011403200100013023&3020&200303022300&&12103200000123&0021030200220&0214322020132&&102322&0331020102E01&&02000&860000216222032010&60&200300126E011&00823302130&100&103010020&21&0130&00312&4300&6302&00&600033F260010001100&6001001C37022200302800&0130101D0&1&4002020010030&0&3&00021003310&00231002000102001130021&002&337012&3210200130023&02&&&00&0&321&03&0300031020021142E7123701002612370&63700013202000001321003327000&&000&320000220113&&13D00101203320001&00237&210&3002&403D021&000&2123D0373012010&0&&00&&30&28000&37032D00000013012002&7&030200120311001032&02100263&02020002201&4&&012000&60102301142&30&00301411302&300030010211000014302003140&3&001023900&&030021410037133&00&26103&1402022300222000312&32&103101033D20132030&13022020200103&&3320013&001122&2&0&0272&&&003D002371021&2001240&&&0032&&&231000&0300222&010001&&0023010001010&3&11002101&332002310&0120031100301&0020010021302&&30&01&33&223112030132100013200&01002120&&903&700100023102003&02&1021003002700122E92000&33000231001&0&00236&&3114260120032E00113022101E100&&2E00101203031B0210&00101&0030120&&01120202013&0012223&022&0231132613001026323701&60039002303&E00103&60&90220&13&1&03D000&0&02124&010022133160&1300300&620000&84000102&00&6000311&60101210003202001323&30&&&&0&&&B3&703&90000102&01000&00300311&001&600&00000&2E001302C00031020013&0130203D&011002&6&1001326030102&8000&0002011E010302810001&00100200120323D03&00&203713371000200&300&400023&0&1&6130
&02100202&0001&3032000&0&&&30203&01002&2&2&03001130&&0&3202&000323&&&0&003&0&2031930&003120002402E80000318A0&0&00000214230100&01214&301300201&A26131201&120331D22B700&003200013022&&0&0B12002&&0160030&303128200&3&03210002331&B20&&2002000&0003003262&000021&203002013023100230026301&0002&0&00&0&310002301002301301010123003103000102030122&200003&2&30&12&3&0200213000&70032226313&000201&3170&0&30213011000110301203010323230032603&6301001022E&200032103&0&0&22&303&000&0&02103201000&220&0126022602&7000&0010102&1&&21602000110020000&000012&021A&00&300&31&403801141337100215000120031&20&2100&&030&00&&&00321A030020&0010000014&0003201100011A013010000&3000&0001000226&121001100&12&03013D001371000010130200&00031&00310&0&003301103720&37&000&30000020&0&300010&0&203100&&0130022&0130016023840033&0001011400&12031&103&230102011A0&0&10&11&390337320&23021&&1&4000&&&302&0&030&02211B000&001101100203312&021033120300021A26012300&00&&0&002102013000230011&40&&&00&723&D&01&0301&B&211B0302&130211020&03010000&000&302&002021000102302030&E003&703&72660110306214131D60012300210200&2&01&&00&031000021002&&02030010001000111&0&1002&632&60&7&&1371&&0133002300&10&0000300100210030&&&20021002100320010023D2230200320102103D13370000221500110023&022&70033&00011B1121&002E3326&702370&00033B23000120&00&&3&&003921140114230310&0&001021&403310&3000310230100010&&1203202100&300&002&10002&3031B44&300133701&20011000310&3003210002&0&0100&2301237200322103002031120010030023020141000&26&2003020100&&1302&000222144413300032&00111&0&1&402&020000&0230&&3100210311203010130003103002302010203&0000&0&2102&&000101&33731003&00110&30200&31&00200013&0&2037&0011000&20&00&002302032011023012000100&310031011301201321030000022E02100102&0102&0&02301001&00300323130&0000126312603100&00016&2260&00003320&&2010011100100&&10100120000&32100030&0&002001&600103332100320&1100023&11030&3010000230201001&60301002&&31&31001370120&0203130&201&6032630103223&12300&300130012&03203101&1&&00&&&&&&&00023&1403003120&00&&2200022&42&311230100310030&&&&1020112337&001&A013&3&0100100320031&0011B2037011022003310011&0&20&1030201203031300014&026&101600320013&01002&310300003&33&01&&&&&30003201&033211B0&0&00&13&0&1030002&E01&B&100310320&0003310030&0301030233211B210003012303120100&000&010031030102&000&&00&103023021132310021B030001233143&003214200013001022301100100031000110002&0&0023&030&30001100&3&70031&311400312200101926137133703000113&0&&02&&00010021E0023913370200230003221&4210&21412&0&10000&00031&0300303200&2000000212002003320011&0300137201237100&F20&0&&02100200&&&&3&0211B&001&61023390002&001023&123114&00113010230210012100&011300110&013200&10&03011B72000310001100002300003&0023&110020&0101&0210012300310000200&20100010&03112231020103&7000&00003010300210001100&030100322E10&216022223&01&6032803000102232&400&0300020031000020&2&&72339000&&30&0221330&0010&2000310&013013&20102130&10222010110300210200&12&20010033F3114103&03203102&301322010300328012610014212031203010013&0110&0&11430&0&00&30203&28301260032211317103300&03300021B44A44414B1144AB441B4&B411B44A35A71A5A444&A74AAFB444114A534BAB444AB141A44B4414544A4B414A&4441AA741AA&A74444ABB4A441BA444441431102302031&2280021&2600000301223&21&00012E022&0011300322E3731001122130000016011226200000101&2210&30021&023&&002101300020330032610001&0130&1&403302003102&&&21010&0121222600&10&&00&3000030&203314&0320120302&01&00&00&022201002E02181030100223E&00230&0&02&11400000&7&0111030&&223630122010&0120310132010030020123D0&0031&30002&02260&&0&033100013&00230002130&0030&&2&16000101100012013003126013A113201&&0302010100013002132&0126300133D01320&&001&0310302&30&0&30020&0&3&0101&&33&10321020010232003102&00320&301&2&26&1330031000&3&0003010012003&7031201003011B2602&603&&00&2&3E303310001&&712&010030032227&&61230&2100001100010031&0020031220&230100012&0&A0&0&1&0&&3&203&3&4031200&003322030&00022&020&1302003313003&0&02&0&03302&0101020312001020311B20115&602100012021300&300&0&3337033F1000&4131&00&&17&&&7002321E31230102&03370&00&1&0001370002033D0011442373DE21D600013373114001200133D011B20013&32&0311&70012603221703&000&&D&&2&7002300&200100311522100020&01337032110002003201F21C0003&032337&1815261133000312600339353721002&63&2220030&03&000&B000301&0321E70&0000020&&13200217033&001202233&22&&12&1003339&003122030&030100&0&010&32010300314&D0100137210237026012140102203172733101023702372010&01203200&2301140021030&&0011&023000210202&202&&&0000&&&&203&&0310022&260302111030&&0&120&2200011401322&0&0021003203003232&00311002&02&E00143001236300&&131&0&33&12&0&0012&&&000302&00&22610333723123032&1132&&03012&&0&000173&0011320&3020&113320014020&333&000201&603&72001&013312602&A0&&02&002&3&2202302011200133D&&023&1000&220031200002311702&0&2&&D0320003&7&11700&002033100210220130&&&700123D00002230220&&0210230&00312003&03002310020&123&BD0020&1&37033222C37133&&3370237002200023222301116322823700312233003&00&23&020210000337&33123&000&7031000&0262251D830&&000&031930&0&3&0010310373&03102010001&4001&20213000&000&3&233D100200&233F10&20&&30140&30213&&2&30&1000&333723&73122E23222114010326&3F226&&7&&0022301222103001102602&60010&03&12&1312001301001321&023201&02310010000221391416&&&2233000&0020130&3000&3021100231&0&01&7002302&0200320&3&7223D00000&03&0&&00003210331E7103023800032031&0110200&2030102&&&&000120121010000&23210&&&237&33D010020&322D0001&&02&00&&132203021003&03137&&10103314B20410&10&&220002&021419&02002&D20&1B3110003203912002333203320323010320010&31101&00&0&0002&002200021101010&2230032180226&22613001351000&201023012320112002&41100&1022&000321320&1230032000323302021A03023122630120&&0220&00012&0&&630322310020023&0&00212631000110011020&&0&020003301212&1132033&32630130203002&&00&&&312263&2&&1030221&20101320312&2330&0&0&218&32E000313&00002133&0003&&1002326013&D03&7102&0101000022&002101100100120&030232&&0130&2310020&&0&0011000210331221610100001A0120000123&31201002&0&100&&0202&223260120232126&0022&03102&020&&3&0&352802&61030120003120310230031B0332033D1D33&0202103&&&002011200&20&3003220133D021D3260&31D8137120203310037&3373221000223D&30000232260115020&1320&12&&100010101937132021&22236003&32301021013390002311E102039013700&023&3D033F0022&02&6&03002120010203120&12&202132114&101201&30&010&01231022033220237200230&00&123261&&370&&200322013&2301&3002030202&6023010200101013&&131023102&1&&3101012370&2&70&221000&02000&030132002&30000031&0012001320&3F27&317&0032003&0010100&&002&000100100101010&00200100&0&&&23&02&00&&&030231&11000322E03120110&0&0002&323193001031301120012E7000031127&0&3001130202321221&4030&001230021233&3020203003&001322200&0230&31&&&21D2230E337000&023130&0022000031162113&031D37321000&030203023D3115001020132&00120300123&0&12302&&1333D32128003226122E0137010200&02&&120142010&13A2013201232100020&3321000221302000&0&&030110&02033020100&30002140033221020033&2802&&&&2320032&4&222032&3022C332E0&13022102&&2030020002000103&000320&11100&&00200112000230&00310&00200&&&&13002301003&0300220&031000302&&&&&102000&20&&&&&70200100&30010&320100003&B3&200310033213210&&003010011121000200220&4003330&3120011&022330&03&122201002&0203100&222300&6201&0031020&00100021421320000100223000&00&&&00332001013122&0002&020002210023&002&000&3020120002337102&037&&003D0001432&400238B3D2&33302120013100&10&02&23001100&3&6102203002110001&4331B000&0001&302031&10001&&&&337&300&3122211&0&&0210319033D100&002&02031023101200&21010&20&0&001&001203301&60&12E&03&1A372001022&702003&&003022&&&310203200&2&0220&2030&031000&3300100&21001322&2600&114211423&1302321370011014032&03001&0200310001228102220&13&002&002110317100102126&00000020130110003&0021002333212001&0300&&13&E&00&&&000&000&000231&0&220&02621&420&0330123013&00221000&0203120003171257120120&110022601233102820&&0203&1011002000201000300&0023102001003103D&000137001021&&033100&720&0123001230010212323001223&&3&1&303020&00&1300&002&717331&200&0300&7&002370012&&37&002030031430&00032126&2302&0&20310&12020330202100010&3&03200&0010001001&0000022&0300383D261&70&00213603&000302101100&&6001314026&&0102832261000&&30003&1&&321&A310000230222630111000&&301&328&226210030120300&0103100&1302100&0032230013D0020370022301030102&011223702&00&001300200030&2&4001&00132&6002300&&0002140214013900390010210103203210&200300&&&0&023001230023&10010101&000203&00133010200&&&210030220031231203210&200011000002021610228&002130000012001200380&2&&03902003&0&00&3310&210&003003&&30&31301200&32&00003300&2001000230100000&&001300&42032&031103140&02&632&&&314000&403260126011A010&0103&100&0200&31126010&80302&3100&03321&0123000101&0111400313712&0380126&401&420211B00&700&037200003103002002&03001100&11000200&32301120103201&4000000111&0&&4011B&3011002&0&0100&0100012300230000000210000&03228002101603&30011422&3010000&&002001&40&002011&2311000023201300&02000000011&00&2600&B3703430130200370329021&030&&0002&0014&&332&0314&237013D100&03300001203&0&02803103010326000322&00012000&3&01&030&20030&0&110032000032&3000101&0&0&0230003022010&030031003201&221300&03&0011&0100013002011B337222320011B031B33&0030123&00210032&01022&&&100&&0210210020&&000&261000223317&0&003&03001&02003010303203103003220&02003&0223311430000121001014391B1D01120303&&&&&&&131300101&&01230021&72033F203&1000&30&3&023001230011401&000&0300203102&00&123022&00&3200121700&&0&0021&3000001&A010020300&00&03&2&&000132011300&13100010114201302&03010&20131021302001&00&002021023100&0001&&0022&00001000&09&03&01&100&30&114000230&2000000132010&03&E0&0123112&3214&1&4&00110320002301B2314&20032610&0003372600001263010&02&&01103011A&&00&3002&4&30001B3&0&200&0&&413200&2001001&10102&130001100121B731B01000&032300&300&1&01&2000&41023000&30020110&0012&232&3021000300303211002&0&0&001213002301A03010010103000&13300310302&401143001320001337200331413130100391213292003200&000&0002230303002014320132001&22300&230010000&023133&43010003&22020200&39300&02&&&&&2000202233D01B01143023143100113&02&03000&200&220030012&030011A202&1&&1000&D302013&63000&003&3&40001&E0000371&102E230010260&722322D0023002311403&0101&0&D0001311033314&00102&&&&&020001143210261300010001137&0002C140300&E001&A01&70003003012002&302E00130280&&3331&E&&0&02110010200302030&0030002310023&0&102000&300213300301&33&000&00&037203&3200&00&201&&23E000&03200&300&6&&30&20&00013002030001&1&33902030&&0133D012B101&63228B002110203&100&1320 0&000137018001003&00281B010160103&0&4&20331&0&01100020331003&226&3002102&10200030&300&00202010302000301003216&100020030&00332100032011000&6022603100211000100213003002213320010230&002003&02133713002000200&&0&100321100213201021300&0032300012&1&00&0226033711201370220371210&337&&5E&200&&0001032031401940020112033322&00033100101&30120001322E&00&0020310322029A01102137001&3221802311203&1030100101403031423312&3013210&132&0&&F300&&2200&001003211B&&0013&10218&0&3&&00233001&0&20300&003120332002322E021032000337213&&001200&3A000&301002000314301&010101&00&2001&262033001A&11B2228&A31&200100321003010201001030100031300013200000&&226203010&013322260012003000023002230221100&0321A&&010010030010012002300230012B0032210020&3&00&132301&0001&0&00100100023&D000&000000033320373100&3003012&7&&0201226332132012103020001021320&011B200010201100002&31&30&0&A01240001102231020101&020012130021001301&4123000&3011000001&312031100&0131700031100210&2033&21300&002033211B1003012002001&00033A02&40001&B02E&22E01&010319&3002300310000232013&21&3200&3221133220&0&0001&&230&0&3200031002338000210&01&000313A3000&&000&&00230&221030&&1B0023801310031103&&010300111A030&0&33000&310020020130120010220133D00&&0031&00010132100100&&00200210101021002&023021&4201003100120&13370001302230&&11000223000111100132&0&0&002321002320&214&0023100&0&0&&22&0200123000&4203110011011000131001030&0&002003110&0301011023100231&4&0&033102213020&123200&&&03100&00330101102&111400100&0&31000300331010200&020&13121020&1&20&F1001203&0120010&3171&010&0&1100031384200032031120300&01A&11403211A010&2003&0020000321023102&&3100013000131000322100&0&&&001143320101&10220001&A&013000&0031&000&&&0011002010300012112&0211003200&00&00210&1010013&00&31&3&001&012&01030032260&&0301&21002130002102001201&1E703210301211002330&03010020101000203001&&00&2&0&0013301&210&0210100013&3001010203&&0&00261&33100302211020&00030200&0000330120&102&033143201&&0001&&0&0&000&1002&&0301&702&&003300&63031022013&003260113&000116010&0&60000212200&&1000&02&0100203115000302&1000112000320014&010100&00011001002&00237100021&2000100&10&0020001&0201&002&0&02&0&00310020202010010000&&&&200100221&0231132010003&000&1&&1003&1230&0000&13201B20&40002100123000012110203000033320&002100032013020021200&003200231&30000310302&2600313026000&02220030280126001&02&000&01310001&001002&1200&200&00122260&0022&00002E03&6000&00&&2000301011010102030&1103303230000210101&200001301000&0003210&00&3140214100130010222603002221033&612&6030132220&2331201020&20103200033322E&0&0000001010020&000022032&102000&&30140301&011020214321001210021A6&2&600010101&2E11A2600&22310&000311020&014031413D114140230A103000&&00003&200&001114100301000123&20&0&0&&0211B10001&01120314&0000130&13300360&2611B1000200&0010&&002301&410200123010110&&1&2002&A281420311030100&2103201021&4201&0001302&0302003&02011B0013201000&332002140010230001000&302&0200001&220&0021000100&000102030001&&&020230310&03200&0010&1203000&001140003100031262320&3200&401&B00211003032&337011&012003313A201&00&1&00301100&&0001322100&&33&3A263&&0032103&10001&B10001122301002311&001&22E0013&0&3021002&33001030031023000200&02&0001001200&312220&00&02310003&262013100113&0030&&32&0&0&0220021A&011000&30&300&000221000&001231000&10213841020&001&0301&0301A&E0012223103001320&030132&0&02001&200&012001132000320&2013011402260&301&02010030&3&002030010&0&3020103&00011000&&00000130&01200001302E02&60000&031903&002&3&1&00&2&00011000&3&201000003&020120032100020003002101021317130203&311402&00300&0002302012&&3&0023001133&0&420011100&2101300201&B&&&0&01013200102&E322800&130021&0330&001000&0&031B0&030002&003&0023013&0&&0002031031103&&002330&&01003320010001&4130200&0&31200203100001023312000230102031000&4321300&03&21003&200100021420100022302301001&0&01000110011001&000000031430212&02&310212600100012314001&2&00203103D12&01&600103D236003&7032001331&01900001&A201003D1002011&00&3700&B0&311A3120200202&7011B031&3&&0100221&0033D2801010301&00&31&10031011B0&0&301&4103&D00103013310010391137000003&00113020031&20133000&020313&033700201&4232&0&002000103&0302&E1010302121030&2001&10&0021001137022B 020033&&&013001170&21020001903370&0021013270030300200110000&003310&0230001&00&00013&2203&002&12130220&01230&&003020372010&022317312&10&00303&43&3&70010003&02301140320&10001302313020&&003030223001012103200000123&0021030&002200021432&020132&&1023&2&0331020102E01&&0&00018600002162220320101600&0&300126E0110008&3302130&100110301002&&21&0130&0031214300&63021001600033F260010001100&6001001C370&2200302800&&130101D0&11400&020010030&0&3&00&2100331&10023100&0001020011300210002&337012&3210200130023&02&00&0&00321003&0300031020021142E71237010&2612370&6370001320&000&&1321003327000&&000&320000&201130013D001012033&0001100237&210&3002&4&3D021&000021&3D0373012010101000&&30028000&3703&D0000001301200217&0302&0120311001032002100263&020&0002201&4&001&&00&60102301142&3010030141130&13000300102110&0014302003140&3&0010&3900&1030021410037133&00&261030140&0223002&2000312&32&103101033D201320301130220&0200103&&3320013&001122&21000&720&&003D002371021&&001&40&&00032001231000&0300&22&010001&10023010001010030110021010332&&231&&0120031100301100200100213020&30&01&33&22311203013&100&13200101002120&1903&700100023102003102010&100300&700122E92000&33&00&31001&&&00236&&31142601&0032E00113022101E100012E00101203031B02100&0101&0&30120&&011&0&02013&001222300&2002311326130&10263&3701&60&39002303&E00103&60&90220013&1&03D000&0&021&4001002213316011300300&6&0000084000102100&6000311160101210003&02001323030&&&&0&&&B3170319000010210100&&0030&3111001&600&0000012E001302&00031020013&&130203D&&1100216010013260301&218000&00&2011E010302810001&001002001203&3D03&000203713371000200&3001400023&00116130
